name: KOHR Golf Center
about: KOHR Golf Center is a state-of-the-art training facility in Natick, MA, offering a comprehensive range of golf instruction and practice options. The facility is equipped with 55 Trackman bays on its driving range and includes a separate Indoor Center with multiple simulators, a putting green, and dedicated short-game areas. It offers various membership tiers, private instruction, youth programs, and club fitting services. The center provides a professional environment for both serious golfers and families looking to improve their skills or enjoy the sport.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for detailed swing analysis
Dedicated facilities for short game and putting practice
Comprehensive club fitting services with 20,+ shaft and head combinations
Flexible membership options with indoor simulator access

food_and_drink.notes: Catered food options available for private events

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple simulators available for indoor play on virtual courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but KOHR Golf also offers club rentals and a professional club fitting service to find equipment that matches your swing dynamics.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned for general use, but catered food and drinks are available for private events and outings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on the Trackman simulators can vary by player and course, but typically takes around 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is KOHR Golf Center kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, KOHR Golf Center offers junior programs, Nike Junior Golf Camps, and has a welcoming atmosphere for families and younger golfers.
